directive.title: FS-VIZ-MOB-003 — Mobile Chart Interaction: Pinch-Zoom, Swipe-to-Pan & Touch Gesture Handling for W251 BOP Time-Series Ch

auditor.summary: The build implements the core gesture logic correctly: pinch-to-zoom with clamping, pan with proportional offset, double-tap reset, and vertical scroll isolation are all present in the hook. The GestureAffordance component renders zoom indicators and chevron icons with proper opacity transitions. ChartWrapper and BaseChart integrate with the hook via context. However, the build is critically missing all test files required by the acceptance criteria — this was the primary HIGH finding from the prior audit that remains unresolved. Additionally, the fragile child cloning pattern in BaseChart.tsx persists, and custom Tailwind tokens in GestureAffordance.tsx may not be configured. The build is functional but incomplete without tests. Score is 78 due to unresolved HIGH finding (missing tests) and multiple MEDIUM issues.

top_issues.description: Missing test file for useChartGestures hook. The build specification requires automated tests for all acceptance criteria (AC1-AC7), but no test files were generated. This was a prior HIGH finding that remains unresolved.

Fragile child cloning pattern persists. React.cloneElement with children cast as React.ReactElement (line 52) will break with fragments, arrays of children, or string elements. This was a prior MEDIUM finding that remains unresolved.

useChartGestures hook is called unconditionally even when enableGestures is false (line 32). This causes unnecessary state initialization and RAF setup for non-gesture charts. This was a prior LOW finding that remains unresolved.
